_comment: Allowlist of intentional parity divergences between the Pascal DSL and our schema/decoder. Each entry must include a 'reason'. Applied by audit.py --gate to suppress known-good findings.

exceptions.reason: wbPerkEffect is a HARD_RAW_VAR (runtime Pascal decider that cannot be statically resolved). The schema uses a hand-written rstruct override that is more useful than raw_fallback and has been validated against real ESM data. Divergence is intentional.
